introSection: Galaxi was a steel roller coaster previously located at Joyland Amusement Park in Lubbock, Texas, USA. The attraction previously operated at White Swan Park from 1972 until the closure of the park in 1989. It sat standing but not operating for most of 1990 before reopening at Joyland in 1991.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Following Joyland's closure in 2022, the ride was listed for sale by International Rides Management for $79,000 with three trains and "many parts".

fullText:
Galaxi was a steel roller coaster previously located at Joyland Amusement Park in Lubbock, Texas, USA. The attraction previously operated at White Swan Park from 1972 until the closure of the park in 1989. It sat standing but not operating for most of 1990 before reopening at Joyland in 1991.

Following Joyland's closure in 2022, the ride was listed for sale by International Rides Management for $79,000 with three trains and "many parts".



Red track and white supports.
